name: Athina AI
pricing_notes: Free tier: 1,000 evals/mo; Growth $99/mo; Enterprise custom

auth.notes: ATHINA_API_KEY env var; set once via athina.evals.set_env

performance.notes: Eval jobs run async in Athina cloud; response returns eval result object

agent_readiness.notes: Built-in eval runners for faithfulness, relevance, groundedness, custom LLM-as-judge. Dataset management UI. CI/CD integration supported.

gotchas: Free tier limit (1K evals/mo) hit fast in development
Custom eval definitions require YAML config syntax to learn
Dataset versioning not as mature as LangSmith
Pricing jumps steeply from free to Growth tier
best_when: Need structured LLM output evaluation (faithfulness, relevance, hallucination detection)
Building CI/CD pipelines that gate on LLM quality metrics
Want UI dashboard for non-technical stakeholders to review eval results
Teams needing dataset management alongside evaluation
avoid_when: Need real-time production tracing (use Langfuse or Helicone)
Simple pass/fail evals that can be done with unit tests
summary: Athina AI is a dedicated LLM evaluation platform with built-in eval runners for RAG quality (faithfulness, groundedness, relevance), hallucination detection, and custom LLM-as-judge evaluations. Strong CI/CD integration and dataset management UI. Best for teams who want structured eval pipelines with minimal setup, not raw observability.
